markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To define a clear system for managing Sprint client health and risk.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Health Score System:** A Green/Yellow/Red health score system, tracked every two weeks, will provide clear signals for client status and risk.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**CheckFat Strategy:** CheckFat will be a free value-add during Sprints to accelerate conversion to ARR. Upselling is deferred to avoid distracting from the "prove yourself" phase.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [**Content OS Demo:** Daniel demoed the Content OS, a new platform designed to automate content production and client feedback, potentially shortening Sprints to 3–4 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
  - [**EM Role Transformation:** The EM role will shift from tactical execution to strategic advisory, using the OS to guide clients and manage the automated pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=5341.0)

## Topics

### Sprint Health Score & Risk Signals

[A Green/Yellow/Red health score system, tracked every two weeks, will provide clear signals for client status and risk.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

  - [**Weeks 1–2 (Strategy & Kickoff)**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**Green:** Strategy approved, artifacts delivered, calibration article sent, proactive client engagement, clear stakeholders, all access granted.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [**Red:** Client unhappy with strategy, requesting scope changes, or unresponsive.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Weeks 3–4 (Ramp-up & Production)**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [**Green:** Content calendar & OS approved, production ramped to 5 articles/week, calibration article approved.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Red:** Content OS not approved, publishing blocked, or client feedback is purely tactical.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [**Weeks 5–6 (Performance & Refinement)**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
      - [**Green:** Content indexed, driving impressions/clicks, and feedback is minimal.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
      - [**Red:** High volume of edits, especially if client messaging is pivoting.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)

### Content OS Demo & Sprint Transformation

[Daniel demoed the Content OS, a new platform designed to automate content production and client feedback, potentially shortening Sprints to 3–4 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)

  - [**Core Functionality**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
      - [**Automated Setup:** Crawls client sites to generate personas, taxonomy, and tone/style guides.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
      - [**Opportunity Discovery:** Research agents find new content opportunities based on competitors, topics, and top-performing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=3803.0)
      - [**Workflow Automation:** Uses "Content Types" to automate briefing and execution workflows, reducing manual effort.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=3160.0)
  - [**Client & Team Experience**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=4337.0)
      - [**Client Review:** A read-only UI for annotation captures feedback, which the system learns from to recalibrate its models.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=4428.0)
      - [**EM Role Shift:** The EM role becomes more strategic, guiding clients through the OS and translating their business goals into platform actions.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=5341.0)

### CheckFat Strategy

[CheckFat will be a free value-add during Sprints to accelerate conversion to ARR. Upselling is deferred to avoid distracting from the "prove yourself" phase.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)

  - [**Rationale**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
      - [**Accelerate Conversion:** Use CheckFat access as leverage for an early renewal or to secure the ARR conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
      - [**Protect NRR:** Upsells during the Sprint do not count toward Net Revenue Retention (NRR), a key valuation metric.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2682.0)
      - [**Focus on Value:** Avoid sales motions that distract from proving value and converting the client.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [**Future State**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2390.0)
      - [CheckFat will be a standard SKU in future contracts, bundled with the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2390.0)

### Pre-Kickoff Process

[A new pre-kickoff process will be implemented to reduce surprises and improve Sprint success.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

  - [**Key Activities (14 days prior)**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [Competitive analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [Technical audit (site health, GSC/GA setup).](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
      - [CMS walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [Initial context gathering.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Golden Gate:**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
      - [Create a Notion doc to consolidate Sprint processes (Journey, Operator's Guide, Troubleshooting).](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=5581.0)
      - [Prioritize development of the Content OS crawler and UI.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=5581.0)
  - [**All EMs:**](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=5658.0)
      - [Begin using the Content OS for strategy and calibration in parallel with current workflows by early March.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=5658.0)
      - [Use CheckFat as a free value-add during Sprints to accelerate conversion to ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/18Q2dMtKRKtGyofbBJaHLCQk4dj4csqj?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
